_doc: DS30 index constituent list — the 30 blue-chip trading codes that make up the DSE 30 index. Sourced from https://dsebd.org/dse30_share.php (the dedicated 30-row members table). Used by the one-time DSE day-end-close backfill (scripts/backfill_dse_dayend.py) to enumerate which scrips to pull per-share daily closes for. metric_id pattern: dse_close_<CODE>.
_status: POPULATED 2026-05-30 from the live DS30 members table. DSE rebalances DS30 semi-annually (Jan / Jul) — re-run the DS30 list fetch and regenerate this file after each rebalance. Brief-side reads are keyed by metric_id, so dropped constituents keep their historical rows; new constituents need a fresh backfill over the desired window.
